title: MVS AST
description: A specification grammar/schema decomposed into uniquely-identified, measurable nodes. Produced by Phase 1; consumed by the telemetry engine, pruner, and RFE re-run.

grammar.description: Identifier for the decomposed standard, e.g. 'rfc3986-uri' or 'rfc5280-x509'.

source.description: Provenance of the grammar text the nodes were extracted from.

root.description: Node id of the grammar's start symbol. Must be a key in 'nodes'.

nodes.description: Every grammar rule / ASN.1 tag / string type / optional sequence, keyed by its unique node id.

node_id.description: Stable identity for a node: '<grammar>:<rule-path>#<hash8>', where hash8 is a hex digest of the node's structural path (disambiguating repeated rules).

kind.description: Structural role of the node in the grammar/schema.

children.description: Ordered node ids of this node's direct constituents. Each must be a key in 'nodes'.

span.description: Byte range into the source grammar text the node was extracted from.
